name: backrooms.(NOT FINISHED GRR)
description:
[Sound of static and the distinct echo of a large, concrete space. A faint clink of metal against concrete.]

####(Male, still weary, but with a edge of relief): Okay, tape recorder's working. This is Group L.T. 2# again. We... we made it out. Out of Level 0.

#####(Female, voice laced with disbelief and concern): Out of Level 0, anyway. Still lost, still screwed, but... different screwed. And #### almost got more screwed five minutes ago.

####: Hey, give me a break. It looked just like Almond Water. How was I supposed to know?

#####: Because it was sitting in the middle of a clear floor with no pipes above it? That's a red flag, ####. A big one.

####: Yeah, well... ###### had my back. Pulled me back by the collar right as my foot was about to hit it.

[A long pause. Then ######’s deep voice cuts in, quiet but clear.]

######: False Puddle. Deep pit. Sharp teeth.

####: Right. False Puddle. That's what he called it. So... add that to the list of things to watch out for. They look like Almond Water puddles, but they're basically giant traps waiting to swallow you whole.

#####: Great. So now we can't even trust water on the floor. This place gets better and better.

####: We also found that black metal door I mentioned last time. Opened it this time – led to some maintenance halls. Brighter than the main garage, but...

#####: But what?

####: The walls are covered in paintings. Some in frames, some just on scrap paper nailed up. Looked harmless at first, but then I saw one.. the eyes on t
creator: Andy_the_spirit
